notes: Azure Pipelines for Slack build/release notifications. Serialize an example's `blocks` array into an action's `text` field. Build card = header (🟢 Build succeeded) + a linked build title section + section(fields) for Pipeline/Branch/Result/Triggered by + a stage-progression section (✅ per stage) + a duration/artifact context. Release cards can show a stage chain (Build → Sign → Stage → ⏳ Prod-Gate) where the gate is 'awaiting approval' to stage a pending-approval beat. Fits CI/CD/DevOps/release channels.

examples.name: build_succeeded
examples.when: A CI build passes all stages after a merge; posted to a dev/DevOps channel.

text.text:
*<https://dev.azure.com/TMNA/AudioMultimedia/_build/results?buildId=1287|audio-multimedia-nextgen · Build #1287>*
AGL head-unit image built with the Woven Arene SDK build integrated.
*Stages:*  ✅ Restore · ✅ Build (AGL Yocto) · ✅ Arene SDK integration · ✅ Unit tests (2,140 passed) · ✅ Package head-unit image

elements.text: Duration 22m 47s · Artifact hu-image-1287.img published to feed

examples.name: release_awaiting_approval
examples.when: A release pipeline reaches a production gate that requires manager approval; stage chain shows the gate pending.

elements.text: RXSWIN updated · package signed · triggered by emily_development @ a1f9c02
